brand-coral.usage: Primary actions, active states, brand connection moments.

brand-lilac.usage: Soft Seoul-modern grouping and selected secondary surfaces.

background.usage: App background; keep clean and subtle.

display.purpose: Major landing and onboarding moments only.

body.purpose: Thai, Korean, and English content with equal readability.

label.purpose: Tabs, chips, metadata, and compact controls.

rules: Coral/rose should guide action and affection, not become a sugary dating-app wash.
Prefer clean off-white, ink, and restrained accent placement over heavy gradients.
Never sacrifice Thai or Korean readability for compact Latin-only rhythm.
Elevation clarifies hierarchy and touch targets; it is not decoration.
